company_name: Petco Health and Wellness Company, Inc.
description: Petco Health and Wellness Company, Inc., operates as a pet specialty retailer, focuses on enhancing the lives of pets, pet parents, and its Petco partners in the United States, Mexico, Puerto Rico, and Chile. The company provides veterinary care, grooming, and training services; and pet care supplies and companion animals. It also offers a range of consumables, supplies, and services through its petco.com website and mobile app. In addition, the company treats whole pet, including their physical, mental, and social well-being.
